channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
Permanent repair Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 600x500x20mm tarmac parch number 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low hanging branches causing issues for vans coming and going regularly, 8th April
item.description:
Outside 80/82 Leckhampton Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitley Court, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branch growing towards power lines, 8th April
item.description:
The branch in question has previously damaged a vehicle, and there a is concern about it potentially effecting nearby power lines. Approximately what3words location:afford.dark.shirts
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Butt's Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
Pothole CW. 500x300x40mm Road closure X 4 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
Pothole CW. 600x300x40mm Road closure X 3 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large damaged areas to road surface. Cars are routinely driving on the wrong side of the road to avoid., 8th April
item.description:
On high street, more or less near the care home . Has been present several weeks (since the races) and no paint indicating it is known or being dealt with.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, High Street, Noverton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole opposite bank street, 8th April
item.description:
On the high street just up from the bank street intersection towards cleeve hill. Been there for several weeks- no paint indicating it’s been reviewed/dealt with
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32;34, High Street, Noverton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lqck of signage where footpath passes through farm, 8th April
item.description:
Where footpath passes through farm it is not clear where it runs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in the road just before coming to the end of the restricted speed limit., 7th April
item.description:
Pothole between the 2 lanes, heading up from the roundabout towards Birdlip. Close to the yellow grit bin and across from where the old Air Balloon pub used to be.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Birdlip, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped bike, 7th April
item.description:
Bike with missing front wheel at top of slope
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped furniture, 7th April
item.description:
Various items of furniture tipped in alley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, New Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path uneven, broken and lifted due to tenents at 36 using the area as a drive., 7th April
item.description:
The whole path. It's lifted, paving slabs have been broken and split and are raised. The area is incredibly dangerous for any pedestrians and could cause harm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Gwernant Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Dangerous metal gates placed in field boundaries, 7th April
item.description:
No footpath signs, no stiles and dangerous metal gates with barbed wire obstructing the footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
